name: dotseal-vscode
description: Edit dotseal .env.enc files as decrypted virtual documents.

scripts.pretest: npm run build && npm run check

dotseal.autoOpen.description: Automatically open .env.enc files through dotseal's decrypted virtual editor.

dotseal.keyFile.description: Optional path to a dotseal master key file. When empty, dotseal searches upward for .dotseal.key.

dotseal.masterKey.description: Optional base64 dotseal master key. Prefer DOTSEAL_MASTER_KEY or .dotseal.key instead of storing secrets in editor settings.
